topic: The previous tenant of my apartment left a calendar marked he comes by every Tuesday at nine
title: The Previous Tenant Left a Calendar Marked HE COMES BY Every Tuesday at Nine | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The previous tenant left a calendar marked he comes by every Tuesday at nine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old paper wall calendar hanging on a kitchen wall, every Tuesday square filled with handwritten letters reading he comes by, dim ambient kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I moved into a second floor walk up in Saint Paul last fall.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a converted Victorian apartment building at dusk, a single warm window glowing on the second floor, a narrow staircase visible at the entrance, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I left the calendar where I found it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the same wall calendar hanging in a different kitchen, boxes of moving supplies visible on the counter below it, soft afternoon window light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First Tuesday I lived there I forgot it was Tuesday.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a quiet apartment living room at night, a laptop open on a sofa, a half eaten dinner on a side table, a single floor lamp glowing, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a wooden apartment door from inside, the brass deadbolt visible, dim hallway light leaking under the door, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Through the peephole nothing. The hallway empty.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dim apartment hallway from a doorway, a single ceiling sconce providing weak light, no figures visible in any direction, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a smartphone screen showing a text message conversation with the landlord, the messages reading in plain text, dim ambient evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He said the previous tenant had broken her lease in March.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old lease document on a kitchen table, a termination notice paperclipped to it, dim pendant lamp light overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She left everything behind. She did not collect the deposit.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of an apartment closet partially full of a stranger's clothes still on hangers, dust visible in the air, a single bare overhead bulb, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every Tuesday at nine the same knock. The same empty hallway.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a brass deadbolt on an apartment door at night, the chain lock secured, dim hallway light visible through the peephole, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last Tuesday I did not look through the peephole.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of an apartment living room at night, a person sitting motionless on a sofa facing away from the door, the room lit only by a single floor lamp, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He did not knock. He turned the doorknob.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close shot of a brass apartment doorknob from inside, the knob caught mid rotation, the chain lock taut against the door frame, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
